cms-86: Everything you need to know about our holiday lighting services.
cms-87: How much does holiday light installation cost?
cms-88: Costs vary based on the size of your property, complexity of the design, and type of lights. We provide free, no-obligation estimates. Contact us for a personalized quote.
cms-89: Do I need to be home for installation?
cms-90: Not necessarily. Once we've completed the initial consultation and design walk-through, our team can install your lights while you're away. We'll coordinate with you to ensure everything meets your expectations.
cms-91: What type of lights do you use?
cms-92: We use commercial-grade LED lights that are energy-efficient, durable, and produce a beautiful, consistent glow. Our lights are professionally rated for outdoor use and designed to last throughout the holiday season.
cms-94: Yes! We provide holiday lighting for businesses, shopping centers, office parks, HOAs, and municipal properties throughout the Atlanta area.
cms-95: When should I schedule my installation?
cms-96: We recommend scheduling in early fall (September–October) to secure your preferred installation date. Our installation season typically runs from November through early December.
cms-97: What happens if a bulb burns out?
cms-98: It's common for bulbs to go out during the season. Simply call, text, or email us and we'll schedule a repair promptly. If you have a special event or family visiting, just let us know a few days in advance and we'll replace the bulbs at no charge.
cms-100: Ready to Have Your Holiday Lights Done for You?
cms-101: Fill out the contact form, and one of our lighting experts will reach out to you within the hour. You can also reach us during business hours.
